subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The grace and bounty of the Sovereign of existence hath reached such a degree that the women in this Most Great Dispensation have been raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله فضل و جود سلطان وجود بدرجه رسیده که نساای در این کور اعظم مبعوث
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @equality of men and women
